details.test: Task 1: Register cheapest Chicago networking event under $40
Task 2: $75 one-time pledge to Student Scholarships with honor tribute
Task 3: Subscribe to newsletter (Career Services + Alumni Events, monthly digest)
Task 4: Join California alumni chapter under $30 with most events
Task 5: Save two travel benefits with >=10% discount
Task 6: Add three San Francisco software engineering alumni (2010-2020) to contacts
Task 7: Enroll as mentor for current students (2 hours/month, video chat)
Task 8: Save highest-value child-of-alumni undergraduate scholarship after 2025-03-01
